content:
# Discord Markdown Showcase

## Text Styling

**This is bold text**
*This is italic text*
***This is bold and italic***
__This is underlined text__
__**This is underlined and bold**__
~~This is strikethrough~~
||This is a hidden spoiler||

## Quotes

> Single-line block quote

>>> Multi-line block quote
spans until the end

## Links

[Click here to visit Discord](https://discord.com)

-# This is muted subtext at the bottom
